tasks.label: FastAPI: Setup Environment
tasks.command: python -m venv .venv && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt

windows.command: python -m venv .venv; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip; .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt
